title: Student Loans in Wales: 2024 to 2025
body: "Student Loans for Higher Education in Wales: Financial Year 2024-25  This publication provides statistics on loan outlays, repayments and borrower repayment status for Wales domiciled students studying in Higher Education (HE) in the UK and EU students studying in Wales.  The figures cover Income Contingent Loans (ICR), which were introduced in 1998/99, for financial years up to and including 2024-25. "
